title: rubus rivularis var. gorliciensis
intro: Rubus rivularis var. gorliciensis, also known as the Gorlic raspberry, is a variety of the raspberry plant that is native to Poland and Eastern Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The Gorlic raspberry has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals. Herbal preparations of Rubus rivularis var. gorliciensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
